habitat: Deciduous forests of eastern North America; heavily wild-harvest regulated.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional tonic parallel to Asian ginseng; major export to Chinese markets historically.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelles Tonikum parallel zum asiatischen Ginseng; historisch großer Export nach China.
cautions: Similar cautions as Asian ginseng regarding drugs and long self-medication. CITES-related trade rules apply to wild roots.
historicalNotes: Drove 18th–19th century trade from Appalachia to China.
habitatDe: Deciduous Wälder von eastern Nordamerika; heavily wild-harvest regulated.
cautionsDe: Similar cautions as Asienn ginseng regarding drugs und long Selbstmedikation. CITES-related trade rules apply zu wild roots.
historicalNotesDe: Drove 18th–19th century trade von Appalachia zu China.
